findings.description: The outbound processing label is rendered as "[復路処理]" in the knowledge file, but the source file reads "[往路での処理]" (which appears to be a typo in the source, but the knowledge file silently changed the label rather than preserving the source text).
findings.source_evidence: Source: `**[往路での処理]**` (under `.. _outbound:`). Knowledge file: `**[復路処理]**`.

findings.description: The type of `permissionFactory` is listed as `PermissionFactory` in the knowledge file, but the source table has `PermissionFactorry` (with a double 'r'). The knowledge file silently corrected what appears to be a source typo without preserving the source text.
findings.source_evidence: Source table: `permissionFactory | PermissionFactorry | 必須指定`. Knowledge file: `permissionFactory | PermissionFactory | ○`.

findings.description: `FwHeaderReader` is a PascalCase class name referenced in the DataReadHandler row of s1's content table but is absent from s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:doc:`../reader/FwHeaderReader` が受信電文中のフレームワークヘッダ部を解析する際に、requestId および userId ヘッダの値をスレッドコンテキストに設定する。`
